Overview Century Communities, Inc., a Delaware corporation (which we refer to as we, us, our, CCS, or the Company), together with its subsidiaries, is engaged in the development, design , construction, marketing and sale of single-family attached and detached homes in 16 states. In many of our projects, in addition to building homes, we entitle and develop the underlying land. We build and sell homes under our Century Communities and Century Complete brands.
